error.title: Something went wrong
error.description: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again or go back to the home page.

about.title: About Toollo
about.subtitle: A collection of 50+ free online tools designed to make your life easier. Built with privacy at its core.
about.privacyFirstDesc: All tools run entirely in your browser. Your files and data never leave your device. Zero tracking, zero data collection.
about.lightningFastDesc: No server processing means instant results. Everything is computed locally using the power of modern browsers.
about.availableEverywhereDesc: Toollo is available in 13 languages and works on any device with a modern browser. No downloads or installations required.
about.freeForeverDesc: All 50+ tools are completely free to use. No subscriptions, no paywalls, no hidden fees. Supported by non-intrusive ads.
about.missionDesc: We believe essential online tools should be free, fast, and private. Too many tool websites upload your data to servers, require signups, or hide features behind paywalls. Toollo is different — every tool runs entirely in your browser, your data stays on your device, and everything is free. No compromises.
about.metaDesc: About Toollo — 50+ free online tools that run in your browser. No signup, no tracking, no data collection.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.overviewContent: Toollo ("we", "us", "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. All our tools run entirely in your browser — your files and data never leave your device.
privacy.noCollect1: We do not collect personal information
privacy.noCollect2: We do not upload your files to any server
privacy.noCollect3: We do not track your tool usage
privacy.noCollect4: We do not use cookies for tracking
privacy.noCollect5: We do not sell any data to third parties
privacy.thirdPartyContent: We use Google AdSense to display advertisements. Google may use cookies to serve ads based on your prior visits to this or other websites.
privacy.thirdPartyOptOut: You can opt out of personalized advertising by visiting
privacy.analyticsContent: We may use privacy-friendly analytics to understand general usage patterns. This data is anonymized and cannot be used to identify individual users.
privacy.networkContent: Some network tools (DNS Lookup, WHOIS, HTTP Headers, etc.) make requests to external APIs to fetch publicly available data. These requests pass through our server but we do not log or store the queries or results.
privacy.contactContent: If you have questions about this privacy policy, please contact us at
privacy.metaDesc: Toollo privacy policy. We don't collect personal data. All tools run client-side in your browser.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.acceptContent: By using Toollo, you agree to these terms. If you don't agree, please don't use our services.
terms.serviceContent: Toollo provides free online tools that run in your browser. The tools are provided "as is" and "as available" without warranties of any kind.
terms.use1: Use the tools for lawful purposes only
terms.use2: Do not attempt to exploit or harm our services
terms.use3: Do not use automated systems to excessively access the tools
terms.use4: Do not redistribute our tools as your own product
terms.ipContent: All content, designs, and code on Toollo are owned by us or our licensors. You may not copy, modify, or distribute our platform without permission.
terms.liabilityContent: We are not liable for any damages arising from your use of our tools. All processing happens in your browser and you are responsible for your own data.
terms.changesContent: We may update these terms from time to time. Continued use of Toollo after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.
terms.contactContent: Questions about these terms? Email us at
terms.metaDesc: Toollo terms of service. Free online tools provided as-is for personal and commercial use.
